title: Russian Natto Pilaf
description: A unique and flavorful side dish that combines the rich flavors of Russian cuisine with the nutritious benefits of natto. This pilaf recipe is a great accompaniment to any meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add 1 cup of natto and cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add 2 cups of pilaf and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add 2 cups of vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
Stir in 1 cup of Russian sauerkraut and 1/2 cup of velvety sour cream.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
